homeCallout.lede: Full-stack engineer at Salesforce building AI services on Data Cloud—turning customer data into useful personalization without losing guardrails.
homeCallout.sub: Deep in CDP, activation, Einstein, and the plumbing that connects it all: data pipelines, AI integrations, Java and JavaScript services, and fast iteration with the team.
